# Akash Sharma — AI Engineer
# Website: https://akashlabs.dev
# Last updated: 2026-06

## Identity

Akash Sharma is an AI Engineer with 4+ years of production ML experience — building forecasting
pipelines, attribution models, marketing science systems, and ML infrastructure at scale.

Current role: AI Engineer at Revsure AI (December 2024 – Present)
Prior role: Data Scientist at ADA Asia (April 2022 – December 2024)
Both roles: Same enterprise SaaS intelligence platform — continuous product ownership.

Contact: asprox124csplayer@gmail.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/akash-sharma-01775b14a/
GitHub: https://github.com/CosmiX-6/

## Primary Positioning

AI Engineer who builds production ML systems that turn complex, high-dimensional data into reliable
business decisions — forecasting pipelines, attribution models, marketing science, and ML
infrastructure that companies depend on.

Secondary positioning: Applied ML Engineer, Senior Data Scientist, Forecasting Data Scientist,
Marketing Science Data Scientist, ML Platform Engineer.

## Core Expertise

- Time-series forecasting (EOQ prediction, multi-horizon, daily scoring)
- Marketing mix modeling (MMM, Hill saturation, adstock, scenario planning)
- Propensity modeling (account, lead, opportunity scoring)
- Multi-touch attribution (Markov Chain MTA with firmographic and campaign enrichment)
- Feature engineering at 1000+ column scale
- SHAP model explainability and interpretability
- PySpark distributed computing on GCP Dataproc
- End-to-end ML system ownership from research through production maintenance

## Verified Impact

- Forecast model MAPE reduced ~52% through forecast category feature engineering
- Modeling pipeline time reduced from 5–6 hours to 1 hour via joblib parallelization
- Migrated revenue metrics pipeline from pandas to distributed PySpark, resolving critical implementation bugs
- 25 production ML systems shipped end-to-end

## Key Projects

### Revenue Forecasting Platform (P01)
End-of-quarter pipeline and booking forecasting system. Production ML predicting outcomes at daily
frequency across 4 quarter horizons. Layers: time-decay adjuster, average-index fallback,
SHAP explainability, configurable multi-model framework (30+ parameters). Built and evolved 2022–present.

### Marketing Mix Modeling Platform (P02)
Full-stack MMX platform: BayesianRidge on STL-decomposed residuals, Hill Curve Transformer
(L-BFGS-B multi-start), adstock decay, PCA attribution, response curve generation, scenario planning.
Supports spend optimization and budget reallocation recommendations.

### Pipeline Projection Engine (P08)
Central projection system integrating 8+ ML model families into daily pipeline and booking
projections. Two-layer architecture: bottom-up propensity aggregation + top-down macro forecast scaling.

### Multi-Touch Attribution (P18)
Markov Chain MTA using removal-effect attribution — customer journeys as Markov states, transition
matrix from historical paths, enriched with firmographic and campaign metadata. Daily attribution
across marketing touchpoints.

## Tech Stack

Python, XGBoost, Ridge Regression, BayesianRidge, scikit-learn, SHAP, STL, SARIMAX, Markov Chain,
L-BFGS-B, PySpark, Spark SQL, BigQuery, GCP, GCP Dataproc, Parquet,
Apache Airflow, Splink, BERT Embeddings, pandas, NumPy, statsmodels, SciPy, joblib

## Education

- Post Graduate Program in Data Analytics — Imarticus Learning (Jan 2022)
- Bachelor of Information Technology — T.Z.A.S.P. Pragati College (Nov 2020)
- IBM Data Science Professional Certificate — IBM × Coursera (Oct 2021, verified via Credly)
- 11 active IBM × Coursera ML/Data Science credentials
